title: viburnum opulus f. nanum
intro: Viburnum opulus f. nanum, also known as the Guelder Rose or Dwarf Guelder Rose, is a compact, deciduous shrub that belongs to the Adoxaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which can be attributed to the presence of alkaloids, flavonoids, and phenolic acids. The plant's medicinal properties have been associated with various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and providing relief from respiratory problems. The herbal preparations of Viburnum opulus f. nanum typically include infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, which can be used to treat various conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
